i=(0,s.getRequestContext)(),[a,o]=(0,t.useState)({}),[d,r]=(0,t.useState)(!0),c=R[e],m={authKey:i.getBasePageUrl().searchParams.get("auth_key")||"",loggedIn:h(i)},{query:v,variables:E,skip:O}=c.getQueryConfig(m),{data:A,loading:N,error:S}=(0,l.useQuery)(v||u,{variables:E,skip:O});return(0,t.useEffect)((()=>{(async()=>{if(!v||!N){const i=await c.processData({...A,...null===n||void 0===n?void 0:n[e]});i&&(o(i),r(!1))}})()}),[A,n,e,c,v,N]),{pageData:a,loading:d,queryError:S}})(c,e),A=(0,t.useMemo)((()=>c!==a.UNKNOWN?{...m,...v}:null),[c,m,v,E,O]);return(0,t.useEffect)((()=>{!A||E||n||(O&&(0,U.reportGrumble)(`Query for Google Tag Manager DataLayer parameters on ${c} page resulted in an error. DataLayer populated anyways.`,O),(e=>{if("undefined"===typeof window)return;const n=Object.entries(e).reduce(((e,n)=>{let[i,t]=n;return{...e,[i]:"boolean"===typeof t?M(t):String(t)}}),{});window.dataLayer||(window.dataLayer=[]),window.dataLayer.push(n)})(A),i(!0))}),[A,E,O,n]),n},H=e=>{const n=P(e),[i,a]=(0,t.useState)(!1);return(0,t.useEffect)((()=>{n&&!i&&(window.dataLayer.push({event:"datalayer-loaded"}),a(!0))}),[n,i]),null}}}]);
//# sourceMappingURL=https://istatic.booking.com/internal-static/capla/static/js/d0a06113.899141c4.chunk.js.map
